title: HLSmithing - Rose Gold & Steel
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/657c3b33d87c7173c2f4aa7f5fa76c514cab29d5.png)

HLSmithing adds two new armor and tool sets obtained via smithing

These are Rose Gold & Steel

Steel has equal protection and damage as iron but with more durability, rose gold has the same as gold but increased durability as well


![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d8fd12df96c834837c97fa3436b275a0d58d7ce.png)
